title: ENPH Q4 Earnings: US Sales Rise 6%, Europe Drops 25%
text: Enphase Energy Q4 2024 results showed U.S. sales rising 6% quarter-over-quarter representing strong domestic performance while Europe dropped 25% reflecting significant regional disparity. U.S. revenue comprised 79% of total revenue demonstrating heavy reliance on domestic market. European challenges attributed to difficult market conditions with lower sell-through and reduced demand. Company shipped 878 megawatts DC microinverters and 152.4 megawatt hours of batteries. Strong cash generation with $159.2 million free cash flow. Management remained focused on geographic expansion and product innovation while navigating regional headwinds.
